words.def: installation from which a military force initiates operations
words.zh: n. 底部, 壘, 基礎, 基地

words.def: any of a class of composite plastics used to make car bodies and cases for computers and other appliances
words.zh: [計] 絕對, 美國標準局

words.def: a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land
words.zh: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
